source: shared fake-transport retry-delay planning and shared CommonFakeRetryScheduler prototype
description: Pins retry delay scheduling on a virtual clock so common runtime retry tests can assert retry count and timing without wall-clock sleeps.

expected.commonDecision: Shared runtime retry tests must schedule retry delays on a virtual clock, assert retry count and elapsed retry times, and avoid wall-clock sleeps before retry policy delegates to shared.

commonRuntimePrototype.status: executable shared commonTest retry-delay scheduler contract

notes: This vector covers only deterministic retry-delay scheduling. Operation-specific retryable errors, reconnect adapters, backoff selection, and public facade error mapping remain feature-specific shared ownership gates.
